_meta.source: Forex Factory screenshots — week of Jul 12-18, 2026
_meta.note: Manually added because FF JSON API forward window is only ~3-5 days. Auto-pruned when FF catches up.
_meta.instructions: Add events from FF screenshots here. Date should be ISO 8601 UTC. Use format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:00.000Z. EST/EDT events: add 4 hours for EDT, 5 for EST. Filter: RED flag = High, ORANGE = Medium, skip yellow.
